# TaxBackwards.ca

> TaxBackwards.ca is a Canadian reverse sales tax calculator. Given a
> tax-included total, it calculates the pre-tax amount and the exact GST,
> HST, PST, RST, or QST paid — for all 10 provinces and 3 territories.
> All rates are verified against CRA and provincial sources. Current as
> of May 2026.

TaxBackwards.ca covers every Canadian province and territory. It is the
only calculator that shows the reverse tax formula and worked examples
for every jurisdiction, including historical rate tables for each
province.

## Calculator

- [Homepage calculator](https://taxbackwards.ca/): Reverse sales tax
  calculator for all provinces and territories. Select a province to
  calculate GST, HST, PST, RST, or QST from a tax-included total.

## Province Tax Guides

- [Ontario](https://taxbackwards.ca/provinces/ontario/): HST 13% — reverse formula, rate history, exemptions
- [Quebec](https://taxbackwards.ca/provinces/quebec/): GST 5% + QST 9.975% — reverse formula, ITR notes
- [British Columbia](https://taxbackwards.ca/provinces/bc/): GST 5% + PST 7% — reverse formula, ITC notes
- [Alberta](https://taxbackwards.ca/provinces/alberta/): GST 5% only — no provincial sales tax
- [Nova Scotia](https://taxbackwards.ca/provinces/nova-scotia/): HST 14% — reduced from 15% April 1 2025
- [New Brunswick](https://taxbackwards.ca/provinces/new-brunswick/): HST 15%
- [Prince Edward Island](https://taxbackwards.ca/provinces/prince-edward-island/): HST 15%
- [Newfoundland & Labrador](https://taxbackwards.ca/provinces/newfoundland-labrador/): HST 15%
- [Saskatchewan](https://taxbackwards.ca/provinces/saskatchewan/): GST 5% + PST 6%
- [Manitoba](https://taxbackwards.ca/provinces/manitoba/): GST 5% + RST 7%
- [Yukon, Northwest Territories & Nunavut](https://taxbackwards.ca/territories/): GST 5% only

## Rate History

- [Rate History Index](https://taxbackwards.ca/rate-history/): Index of all provincial and territorial rate history pages
- [Ontario rate history](https://taxbackwards.ca/rate-history/ontario/): GST and HST milestones 1991–present
- [Quebec rate history](https://taxbackwards.ca/rate-history/quebec/): GST and QST milestones 1991–present
- [BC rate history](https://taxbackwards.ca/rate-history/bc/): GST, HST, and PST milestones including 2011 referendum
- [Alberta rate history](https://taxbackwards.ca/rate-history/alberta/): GST milestones 1991–present; no provincial tax
- [Nova Scotia rate history](https://taxbackwards.ca/rate-history/nova-scotia/): HST milestones 1997–present including 2025 reduction
- [New Brunswick rate history](https://taxbackwards.ca/rate-history/new-brunswick/): HST milestones 1997–present
- [PEI rate history](https://taxbackwards.ca/rate-history/prince-edward-island/): PST and HST milestones 1991–present
- [Newfoundland & Labrador rate history](https://taxbackwards.ca/rate-history/newfoundland-labrador/): HST milestones 1997–present
- [Saskatchewan rate history](https://taxbackwards.ca/rate-history/saskatchewan/): GST and PST milestones 1991–present
- [Manitoba rate history](https://taxbackwards.ca/rate-history/manitoba/): GST and RST milestones 1991–present
- [Territories rate history](https://taxbackwards.ca/rate-history/territories/): GST milestones for YT, NT, NU
